raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "affirmation of willingness or readiness to relinquish control over personal flaws to an external agent",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the speaker possesses defects of character",
    "these defects are removable by God",
    "God exists and has the capacity and willingness to perform such removal",
    "the speaker has reached a state of complete readiness for this removal"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a declarative statement of psychological/spiritual readiness, though grammatically incomplete (subjectless clause)",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the statement is used within a voluntary self-improvement framework where the audience accepts theistic premises and finds value in surrendering agency over character traits",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is presented as an objective factual report rather than a subjective commitment, or is used to imply that defects will be removed without personal effort or evidence of efficacy"
}
